Spider Solitaire
Back to Game

Spider Solitaire FAQ, Rules, and Strategy

Last updated: May 15, 2026

What is Spider Solitaire?

Spider Solitaire is a classic patience card game played with 104 cards. Your objective is to create complete same-suit runs from King down to Ace.

How to Play Spider Solitaire

  • Move a face-up card to a card that is exactly one rank higher.
  • Create descending sequences to unlock stronger moves.
  • Complete a same-suit K-to-A run to clear it.
  • Clear all 8 completed runs to win.

Difficulty Modes

1 Suit Spider Solitaire: Best for beginners and quick wins.

2 Suits Spider Solitaire: Balanced challenge with more planning.

4 Suits Spider Solitaire: Classic expert mode with maximum strategy depth.

Best Spider Solitaire Strategy Tips

  • Reveal face-down cards as early as possible.
  • Protect empty columns; they are your most flexible resource.
  • Build same-suit runs before dealing from stock when possible.
  • Use undo and hint thoughtfully to learn better move patterns.

Is Spider Solitaire available on mobile?

Yes. spidersolitaire.xyz supports touch drag-and-drop and mobile-friendly layout for phones and tablets.
